settlement.plaza.name: The Rim Plaza
settlement.plaza.description: Lantern-light pools across worn flagstones at the very lip of the abyss. A cold updraft breathes from the great dark shaft to the west of the well, and the murmur of the last human outpost surrounds you. Stairs spiral down into shadow.

settlement.market.name: The Rim Market
settlement.market.description: A huddle of stalls and a smith's forge glowing warm against the chill. Traders eye the shaft and speak in low voices of what comes up from below — and what does not come back.

shaft.landing-1.name: First Landing
shaft.landing-1.description: The spiral stair widens onto a narrow landing. Daylight from the rim still reaches here, grey and thin. The steps continue down into deeper gloom.

shaft.landing-2.name: Second Landing
shaft.landing-2.description: Here the last of the rim-light dies. The air is wet and still. Your own breath sounds loud. A passage opens north into a black gallery.

dark.gallery.name: The Black Gallery
dark.gallery.description: A vast dark space; sound returns from far walls you cannot see. Something skitters at the edge of hearing. Without light, the dark is absolute.

dark.warren.name: The Dweller's Warren
dark.warren.description: A low, fetid chamber of piled stone and bone. This is a lair, and it is not empty. The darkness here feels watchful.
